task_description: Open a group conversation in a messaging app and send the message "HELLO".

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the rounded search field at the bottom taskbar with a magnifying-glass icon on the left and the Chinese placeholder text “搜索”. The semitransparent red X is centered on this taskbar search box, indicating the target is this UI control. In the full-screen view, a browser window is open on a news-style start page, and the Windows taskbar is visible along the bottom with the search box near the center-left.
caption.action: Click the Windows taskbar search box labeled “搜索”.
caption.expectation: The taskbar search box should become active, likely opening the Windows search panel or placing a text cursor in the search field for typing.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the Windows search panel’s recent/app suggestions list. A semitransparent red X is centered on the row labeled “微信,” which has the green WeChat icon with two overlapping chat bubbles to its left. This is a selectable result row in the search panel, not a blank area. In the full-screen view, the Windows search panel is open over a browser window, with the same list of results on the left and content cards on the right.
caption.action: Click the “微信” result row in the Windows search panel.
caption.expectation: The “微信” result should become selected and the app should begin opening, bringing up its window or launch splash screen.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the WeChat conversation list. A semitransparent red X is centered on the chat row labeled “美丽姐姐粉丝团,” which has a small collage-style group avatar on the left, the preview text “咕：别想太多” beneath the name, and the time “17:23” on the right. This is a selectable conversation item in the chat list. In the full-screen view, WeChat is open in the foreground with the left sidebar of icons, the conversation list in the middle, and a large mostly blank chat pane on the right with the faint WeChat logo, indicating no conversation is currently open in the main pane.
caption.action: Click the “美丽姐姐粉丝团” chat row in the WeChat conversation list.
caption.expectation: That conversation should become selected, and its messages should load in the right-hand chat pane.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the message composer toolbar at the bottom of a WeChat chat. A semitransparent red X is centered on the small green folder icon, and a pale tooltip below reads “发送文件,” indicating the send file button. Nearby are a smiley-face emoji icon on the left, scissors and a three-dot bubble icon on the right. In the full-screen view, the WeChat window is open to the group chat “美丽姐姐粉丝团 (3),” with the conversation list on the left, message history in the center-right, and the toolbar above the input area at the bottom.
caption.action: Click the green folder “发送文件” button in the chat toolbar.
caption.expectation: A file selection dialog should open so a file can be chosen and sent to the current chat.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the top-right corner of the Windows file-open dialog. A semitransparent red X is centered on the red square button with a white X inside, which is the window close control. Immediately to its right is a gray title-bar area with another small dark X from the underlying window visible in the background. In the full-screen view, a file selection dialog is open over WeChat, showing a folder with document files listed in the main pane and filename/open controls at the bottom; WeChat remains visible behind it in the current group chat.
caption.action: Click the red close button with the white X in the top-right corner of the file-open dialog.
caption.expectation: The file-open dialog should close immediately, returning focus to the WeChat chat window without selecting a file.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a plain light-gray blank area with a semitransparent red X centered on it; there is no visible button, icon, text label, handle, or other control under the X, so the click target is a blank region. In the full-screen view, WeChat is open to the group chat “美丽姐姐粉丝团 (3)” with the conversation list on the left and the message thread on the right. The red X falls in the empty message area beneath the visible chat bubbles and above the input toolbar, not on any specific message or UI control.
caption.action: Click the blank region in the chat message pane of the current WeChat conversation.
caption.expectation: Focus should remain on the current chat window, with no new dialog opening; at most, any prior selection or focus state is cleared while the conversation stays active.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image is centered on the WeChat message input area at the bottom of the chat window. In the text-entry box, the lowercase text "he'l'l" is visible with the typing caret at the end, indicating text is being entered into the current message draft rather than clicking a control. Directly beneath the input box, a Chinese input candidate bar is open, showing numbered suggestions such as "核力量," "hell," and other Chinese phrase candidates. In the full-screen view, WeChat is open to the group chat titled "美丽姐姐粉丝团 (3)," with the conversation list on the left, chat history in the middle, and the green "发送(S)" send button at the lower right; the typed text is being entered into this active chat's compose field and appears to be appending to the current draft.
caption.action: Type HELLO into the message input box of the current WeChat chat.
caption.expectation: The compose field should update to include the typed text, and the input method candidate bar may refresh while the unsent message remains in the draft area.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the Chinese input candidate bar directly below the WeChat message box, with numbered options including text such as "hello," "合理," "荷兰," and "喝了." A semitransparent red X appears over the candidate area, but the raw action indicates a keyboard action rather than a click. In the full-screen view, WeChat is open to the group chat "美丽姐姐粉丝团 (3)." The message input field contains "hello," the candidate bar is still open, and the green "发送(S)" button is visible at the lower right.
caption.expectation: The current input should be confirmed and the drafted message should be sent to the chat, causing it to appear in the conversation and clearing or updating the compose box.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a plain light-gray area with a semitransparent red X, but because the raw action is a keyboard action, the relevant target is the active screen rather than that marked spot. In the full-screen view, WeChat is centered on the desktop in the group chat titled "美丽姐姐粉丝团 (3)." The message compose box at the bottom contains the text "hello," and the green "发送(S)" send button is visible at the lower right, indicating the draft is ready to be sent.
caption.expectation: The drafted message should be sent into the current chat conversation, and the input box should clear or move focus after sending.
